question:
What is the ethical flaw in the "might makes right" philosophy?
A) It assumes that physically strong people are always highly intelligent.
B) It equates moral justification with power, abandoning justice and protecting the strong at the expense of the weak.
C) It requires too much exercise to maintain.
D) It prevents military conflicts from ever occurring.
